description: Style NoteMulti purpose bags with oodles of style and tons of detailing mark baggit out - and they also succeed in keeping the designs understated and charming. Easily to pair up with whatever you're wearing to complement any outfit. Go ahead and grab your favourite from Baggit's classy range of bags. Product DetailsPink bag with sequin detailing and branding in frontTwo adjustable strapsOne main zippered compartment with a zippered compartment as a divider insideOne zippered compartment at the back and two zippered pockets at the frontMaterial and CareSynthetic and fabricWipe with a clean damp cloth when neededSizeHeight: 33 cm Width:  31 cmDepth: 7 cm
